steps.title: Use the overview goal
steps.content: The student wants an overview of the Haber-Bosch process. A good overview should state the process's product, inputs, and required conditions rather than only its history or use.

steps.title: Reject partial summaries
steps.content: A names some requirements but omits the product. C focuses on the inventors and fertilizer use, not how the process works. D gives the year and some conditions but leaves out the inputs and output. The answer is B.
